title: sorghum sorghum
intro: Sorghum sorghum, a type of grain crop, is a drought-tolerant plant belonging to the grass family and is also known as great millet or durra. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, with its medicinal properties including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of sorghum include reducing the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and diabetes, as well as providing essential nutrients like fiber, protein, and minerals. Herbal preparations of sorghum can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and fever.
